channel.title: Blog on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Kaoto | Free and Open Source Integration Editor for Apache Camel

item.title: Version 2.0.0 TP2 released!
item.description: We are happy to announce the release of Kaoto 2.0.0 TP2 (Tech Preview 2).

item.title: Version 2.0.0 TP1 released!
item.description: With this 2.0.0 TP1 (Tech Preview) release we open up a new chapter for the Kaoto project.

item.title: Change in direction
item.description: What is happening and why? Kaoto was already a great Apache Camel editor, but we were facing some challenges we wanted to address.

item.title: Version 1.1.0 released!
item.description: In this 1.1.0 release, continued focusing on supporting Apache Camel DSLs, such as Camel Route in YAML DSL , Kamelet , KameletBinding and Integration .

item.title: Version 1.0.0 released!
item.description: This marks the first major release for Kaoto. 🍾 Kaoto is an open source visual integration and workflow editor.

item.title: Version 0.2.0 released with improved editor!
item.description: We have a new pre-release version v0.2.0 of Kaoto with a fancy refactored editor!

item.title: Kaoto Over Docker
item.description: There is a Docker Hub KaotoIO organization in which you can find all the docker images for both frontend and backend.

item.title: Kaoto 0.1 is released!
item.description: The first version of Kaoto has been released. In this version, you can already edit a Kamelet Binding both visually and using the YAML editor.
